violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Observed patties in the cooler not date marked.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item * was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Observed single use pan not being stored inverted on the shelf.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Filters in ventilation hood system had grease build up and running down.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. No hand soap at handwashing sink.
